Package academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain

Class PriceBreakdown

java.lang.Object
academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.PriceBreakdown
public final class PriceBreakdown extends Object
Immutable calculation result for a completed checkout.

  • Constructor Details

    • PriceBreakdown

      public PriceBreakdown(BigDecimal subtotal, BigDecimal discountAmount, BigDecimal shippingCost, BigDecimal finalTotal)
      Creates a new checkout result.
      Parameters:
      subtotal - subtotal before discount and shipping
      discountAmount - effective discount applied to the subtotal
      shippingCost - shipping cost after shipping strategy rules
      finalTotal - final amount payable after discount and shipping

  • Method Details

    • getSubtotal

      public BigDecimal getSubtotal()
      Returns the original subtotal before adjustments.
      Returns:
      subtotal with scale 2

    • getDiscountAmount

      public BigDecimal getDiscountAmount()
      Returns the effective discount applied to the order.
      Returns:
      discount amount with scale 2

    • getShippingCost

      public BigDecimal getShippingCost()
      Returns the shipping cost charged for the order.
      Returns:
      shipping cost with scale 2

    • getFinalTotal

      public BigDecimal getFinalTotal()
      Returns the final amount payable by the customer.
      Returns:
      final total with scale 2
